name: when a profile is supplied the enforcer summary line surfaces the profile name and the count of rules it disabled for the file
command:
printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > pod.yaml && printf 'name: t
extends: []
rules:
  g-k8s-no-privileged-container: off
' > prof.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file pod.yaml --profile prof.yaml 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'profile=prof.yaml disabled=1' e.txt && echo summary-surfaces-profile 1>&2
